title: RBX
description: a mode based on the world of roblox (i do not own any of the concepts from the mod,all gears inside the mode are owned by roblox,atlist i assume)
body: RBX is a mode that takes the world of robloxia into the realm of minecraft,the great wizard matt dusekkar had accidently opened a portal to the realm of minecraft,robloxia's myth,seeing the new world weak,have decided to raid it,but couldent quiet keep themselfs intact,leaving fragments,but if someone to pick those up they would return to theyre power and rick havek onto minecraft,thankfully,some roblixians brought gear from theyre world to aid the players of minecraft,i do not own any of the gear's all copyright goes to roblox,while i do not own any of the copyrighted matirial,all models,textures and SFX were made by me(exept the deamonshank model which was made by my friend V2 on discord) NEEDS GECKHOLIB TO WORK
